spec.query:
from(bucket: "Residence")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Powergas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["duration"] == "quarter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "consumption_delta_kwh" or r["_field"] == "production_delta_kwh")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r["_field"] == "production_delta_kwh" then -r._value else r._value }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: sum, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "Residence")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Powergas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["duration"] == "quarter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "consumption_delta_kwh" or r["_field"] == "production_delta_kwh")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r["_field"] == "production_delta_kwh" then -r._value else r._value }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, timeSrc: "_start", createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
